def: The shedding or spilling of blood; slaughter; the act ofshedding human blood, or taking life, as in war, riot, or murder.

A fly of various species, of the family Tabanidæ, noted forbuzzing about animals, and tormenting them by sucking their blood; --called also horsefly, and gadfly. They are among the largest of two-winged or dipterous insects. The name is also given to differentspecies of botflies. [Written also breese and brize.]
Belonging to the class Polyandria; having many stamens, or anynumber above twenty, inserted in the receptacle.
Neglect of execution; nonperformance; as, the inexecution of atreaty. Spence.
Wearing a collar; -- said of a man or beast used as a bearingwhen a collar is represented as worn around the neck or loins.
The office or position of an undersheriff.
A genus of intestinal worms which includes the common tapewormsof man. See Tapeworm.
A discourse or colloquy by three persons.
